column1: ULTIMATE TAX DEDUCTION TRACKER - INSTRUCTIONS & TIPS

This professional-grade system will help you maximize deductions and

ź Enter expenses within 24 hours when possible
ź Take photos of receipts with your smartphone

ź Be honest about business use percentages

Your control center showing real-time totals from all categories.
Review monthly to track deduction accumulation.
Track all ordinary and necessary business expenses.
Use IRS-approved categories for proper classification.
Remember: Must be both ordinary AND necessary.
Choose between Simplified Method ($5/sq ft) or Actual Expense.
Office must be used REGULARLY and EXCLUSIVELY for business.
The calculator automatically recommends the better method.
Actual Expenses: Gas insurance repairs maintenance.
Cannot switch methods mid-year for the same vehicle.
Keep detailed mileage logs with business purpose.
ź Business purpose for each trip
Must be related to maintaining/improving job skills.
Only deductible above 7.5% of AGI threshold.
Health Savings Account contributions may be deductible.
Self-employed may deduct health insurance premiums.
Cash donations limited to 60% of AGI.
Property donations limited to 30% of AGI.
Receipts required for all donations over $250.
Expenses must be both ORDINARY and NECESSARY:
ź Ordinary: Common in your business
ź Reasonable: Not lavish or extravagant
ź Business purpose: Clear business benefit
ź Keep records for at least 3 years
ź 7 years if you claim loss from worthless securities
ź Forever if you don't file a return or file fraudulent return
ź Document business purpose for all expenses
